actions.name: public 日计划生成制造指令单接口
actions.evidence: Safe marker probe ADP_E2E_20260620025202_PUBLIC_PRODUCE_NOOP returned HTTP 200 and message 处理成功, but PostgreSQL marker count in wom_produce_tasks remained 0. Source review of WOM_6.1.3.4 shows WOMProduceTaskController.produceTaskCreated delegates to WOMProduceTaskServiceImpl.creatProTask, whose intended creation body is commented out before returning Result.success("处理成功"). Detailed report: docs/backend-table-audit/wom-public-produce-task-created-analysis.md; machine record: metadata/wom-public-produce-task-created-analysis.json; probe evidence: /tmp/adp-public-produceTaskCreated-noop-current.json.
blockers: Legacy public endpoint returns false success without persistence.
This is an implementation/product-contract gap, not a PostgreSQL compatibility SQL gap.
Use produceTaskCreated2 as the accepted daily-plan generation baseline until the public endpoint is restored or explicitly disabled.
